_note: Asset catalog for MTWW. Tracks what exists, where it lives, and what we still need. Add entries as materials surface from email, OneDrive, Dave's files, etc.

_statuses.have_remote: Exists in OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox, Box, email — not yet pulled down
_statuses.need: Should exist but haven't located it yet
_statuses.not_applicable: Doesn't exist and doesn't need to

_locations: Freetext. Examples: 'OneDrive/MTWW/', 'email from Dave 2019-03', 'iCloud/Just So/', 'Dave's computer', 'Beat by Beat portal', 'unknown'
_privacy: IMPORTANT: Some materials (cast lists, newsletters, programs, photos) contain names and images of minors who participated in AG productions. Do NOT download or commit these files to git. The catalog tracks metadata only — what exists and where to find it. Any production photos used on the public site require verified photo release forms (check AG CampDoc/Sawyer enrollment records). When in doubt, ask GiGi.
_searched: 2026-03-07: Personal Gmail (garenhudson@gmail.com) — 438 messages across 'just so', 'becky thatcher', 'off to olympus', 'pots and pan', 'actors garden', 'lead sheet'. Found 35 unique OneDrive links, 3 Dropbox links, 1 Box link.
